steps.title: Identify the intensity difference
steps.content: The notes rate sea palm's umami as moderate and bull kelp's as high—a measurable gap between the two seaweeds.

steps.title: Match to the choices
steps.content: D directly states that bull kelp's umami is “the more intense of the two,” capturing the intensity ratings from the notes. The other three fail to highlight any difference between the seaweeds. That matches choice D — D is correct.
